title: Rumen Radev's party wins Bulgarian election
summary: Rumen Radev's Progressive Bulgaria party has won Sunday's Bulgarian election - the eighth general election in five years. Rumen Radev's Progressive Bulgaria party has won Sunday's Bulgarian election - the eighth general election in five years.
